description_long: This house features a sprawling, multi-section layout with a predominantly white exterior and numerous rectangular windows distributed across all sides. The structure appears to be a single-story building with a flat roof, and the interior is partially visible, revealing various rooms with distinct flooring and furniture arrangements. The rightmost section includes a spacious room with pink and brown furnishings, while the central area contains a kitchen and dining space with wood-patterned floors. The window arrangement is mostly regular, with some asymmetry in placement, and the house lacks prominent exterior ornamentation. The main entryway is not immediately visible, but the design suggests a modern, functional approach with minimal decorative elements. The overall style is reminiscent of a contemporary ranch house, emphasizing horizontal lines and open interior spaces.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white exterior, and numerous rectangular windows. The layout is expansive and open, with visible interior rooms and minimal exterior ornamentation.
description_view_0: This view shows the house's long side with many windows and a clear look into several interior rooms, including a large, furnished space on the right.
description_view_1: From this angle, the house's depth and internal hallway layout are visible, with a focus on the central and rear sections.
description_view_2: This side highlights the house's broad, flat facade and the regular arrangement of windows, with less interior detail visible.
description_view_3: This perspective reveals the kitchen and dining area, as well as the rear portion of the house, with a focus on interior room divisions.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway is understated, likely featuring a simple door with minimal steps and no prominent porch or decorative elements.
